---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem this solves

What job-to-be-done or pain point does this address?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why did you rule them out?

## Additional context

Mockups, links, references — anything that helps.
